name: plugin-dev
description: Lean, security-aware authoring kit for Claude Code AND Claude Cowork plugins: skills for plugin structure / skill / command / agent / hook / MCP authoring, Cowork-first plugin development with multilingual triggers and connector-aware enrichment, cross-host subagent scaffolding (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode), leak-audit and best-practices-sync passes for existing skills, plus skill-workshop which mines a project's session JSONL history (via the session-analyzer Haiku subagent) for skill candidates; agents for validation, skill review, agent generation, and session mining; create-plugin command for guided scaffolding. Covers 2026 hook events, Cowork primitives (connectors / scheduled tasks / routines), and known Cowork bugs.
